about.title: Who's behind Vexxo Studio?
about.subtitle: I'm a student entrepreneur bridging the gap between academic theory and real-world execution. Vexxo Studio started as a passion project and evolved into a boutique agency focused on helping fellow founders build products that don't just look good — they perform.
about.contactSubtitle: Have an idea or project in mind? Feel free to send a mail — I usually reply within 1–2 business days.

company.title: Built for builders.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: To help entrepreneurs and startups build high-performance web experiences at a fair price — without agency bloat or freelancer chaos.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: A world where every ambitious founder has access to world-class web design without the world-class price tag.
